user.title: Connect to AFERIY PS240 (Local)
user.description: Choose a discovered AECC/SXD device only if you have confirmed it is the master/coordinator, or enter the master's static IP manually. Executor units should not be added separately.

data_description.master_device: Choose the master/coordinator, or leave as manual and enter the IP below.
data_description.host: Static local IP of your master/coordinator battery (e.g. 192.168.0.100)
data_description.port: TCP port the battery listens on (typically 8080)
data_description.name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered AFERIY PS240 (Local)
zeroconf_confirm.description: Home Assistant found a local AECC/SXD device at {discovered_host} ({discovered_serial}). Multi-unit systems may advertise the master and executor units separately. Configure only the master/coordinator unit. If this discovered device is not the master, replace the IP address with the master's static IP before continuing.

data_description.host: Use the master/coordinator battery IP only. Executors should not be added separately.
data_description.port: TCP port from the device advert, typically 8080
data_description.name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect - check the IP, port, and that the battery is online.
error.unknown: Unexpected error - see the Home Assistant log for details.

init.title: Reconfigure AFERIY PS240 (Local)
init.description:
Update the connection details. Home Assistant will reconnect immediately.

Optional helper checklist:

data_description.advanced_energy_sensors: Adds optional estimate sensors that can use solar forecast, tariff, occupancy, and household demand data. Leave disabled for the clean core battery integration.
data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the battery locally, in seconds. Lower values update faster but create more traffic.
data_description.tariff_preset: Defaults to Octopus Intelligent Go. Named presets store their listed times automatically; choose custom to edit the times manually.
data_description.off_peak_start: Start of your cheap-rate charging window in 24-hour HH:MM format. Used only when the preset is custom.
data_description.off_peak_end: End of your cheap-rate charging window in 24-hour HH:MM format. Used only when the preset is custom.
data_description.master_device: Choose the master/coordinator, or leave as manual and enter the IP below. Executor units should not be selected.
data_description.dependency_solcast_confirmed: Tick once Solcast PV Forecast is installed. Used for timed solar forecasts and solar-aware estimates.
data_description.dependency_home_occupancy_confirmed: Tick once home occupancy is enabled. Uses Home Assistant's zone.home occupancy count so empty-house periods do not train the normal demand profile.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect - check the IP, port, and that the battery is online.
error.invalid_time: Use 24-hour HH:MM format, for example 23:30 or 05:30.
error.unknown: Unexpected error - see the Home Assistant log for details.
